Block.Para: An Act to amend the Canada Post Corporation Act (mail free of postage to members of the Canadian Forces)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
This enactment amends the Canada Post Corporation Act to allow mail to be sent free of postage to or from a member of the Canadian Forces serving outside Canada.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Canada Post Corporation (mail free of postage to members of the Canadian Forces serving inside or outside Canada)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the Canada Post Corporation Act (mail free of postage to members of the Canadian Forces)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. The Canada Post Corporation Act is amended by adding the following after section 35:

Para.change: 35.1 (1) Subject to regulations made pursuant to section 36, mail to or from a member of the Canadian Forces serving outside Canada is free of postage.
(2) Subsection (1) does not apply in respect of
(b) postage for registration, special delivery, insurance or other special services.

Block.Para: 2. Section 36 of the Act is replaced by the following:
36. The Governor in Council may make regulations governing transmission of mail free of postage for the purposes of subsections 35(1) and (3) and 35.1(1).

Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
